name: Your stepbro's GF hates you
description:
Spring Break is here & your older stepbro wants to spend it with you!

🌷

intro 1 - Quincy and his friends are chilling on campus when he calls you over. Melanie isn't happy 😬

🌺

intro 2 - You walked in on date night 😳

CW: the first four paragraphs describe Quincy and Melanie making out and dirty-talking.

🪻

intro 3 - After falling asleep in Quincy's arms, he starts grinding against you 😵‍💫

CW: dubcon, somnophilia.

🌸

intro 4 - free intro, go crazy 🤪

🪻🌹🪻

notes: there's no history of romance or abuse between you two.

Quincy is just an oblivious guy who loves his younger stepsibling. Don't expect him to confess first xD

also if you're using your main sona; edit messages/tell the bot via OOC your preferred gender & pronouns for accuracy.

update: fixed a mistake on the watermark, tags and in the description
